title: zosterophyllanthos glabra
intro: Zosterophyllanthos glabra is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, commonly known as the smooth zosterophyllanthos. It is native to Australia and is a shrub that grows in a variety of environments. Zosterophyllanthos glabra has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant can be prepared in herbal preparations such as tea or tincture, which are believed to have health benefits including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing.
